Leaving shop

Cultist at 1 HP. One strike kills.

Viewing card reward
Bowling Bash is excellent vs Slime Boss. 7 damage per enemy for 1E. After split (2+ slimes) it deals 14+ damage per card play. Also great in multi-enemy hallway fights.
Moving to map. Deck now has good attack density: Empty Fist, Carve Reality, Bowling Bash, Eruption + Strikes.
First real fight. Deck has good attack options now. Rest or Elite at F6 depending on outcome.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Slaver
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)  
WIN CONDITION: Kill in 2-3 turns with Wrath burst
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block turn 1, set up Calm, burst kill turn 2-3
KEY CARDS: Empty Fist/Eruption (Wrath entry), Vigilance (Calm exit), Bowling Bash (only 1 enemy so 7 damage)
POTION PLAN: Save all potions for elite/boss

Turn 1: Intent DEBUG. Slaver typically attacks turn 1 for 12-13.
Hand: Miracle(0E), Strike(1E)x2, Bowling Bash(1E), Defend(1E)x2
Energy: 3E

Plan: Full defense + enter Calm.
- Play Miracle(0E, +1E) = 4E
- Defend(1E) + Defend(1E) = 10 block
- But Bowling Bash only does 7 with 1 enemy. Strike does 6.
- With 4E: 2x Defend(2E, 10 block) + 2x Strike(2E, 12 damage) = 4E. But no Calm entry.
- Better: Miracle(0E) + Defend(1E) + Defend(1E) + Strike(1E) + Bowling Bash(1E) = 4E. 10 block + 13 damage.

Or focus on one-shot: Stay neutral turn 1, block as much as possible.
- 2x Defend + Strike + Bowling Bash = 4E with Miracle. 10 block + 13 damage. No stance.
- Next turn draw pile has: Eruption, Empty Fist, Carve Reality, Vigilance, 2x Defend, Strike.
  Likely draw Eruption/Empty Fist for Wrath entry + other attacks.

Better yet: Miracle(0E) + 2x Strike(2E, 12 to Slaver) + 2x Defend(2E, 10 block) = 4E. 12 damage + 10 block.
Or: Miracle(0E) + Strike(1E) + Bowling Bash(1E) + 2x Defend(2E) = 4E. 13 damage + 10 block.

Take the 13 damage option (Bowling Bash = 7 per enemy, with 1 enemy = 7, vs Strike = 6). Yes slightly better.
But honestly, Bowling Bash has 1 enemy = 7 damage. Strike = 6 damage. Barely different.

Key plan: Block fully, chip damage, set up for Wrath burst turn 2.
Incoming est: 12-13. Block 10 = take 2-3. Acceptable.

MARGIN NOTE: No Calm entry available this turn (no Vigilance/Inner Peace in hand). Will draw into them next turn.

events.translated: Empty Fist → Slaver → Carve Reality → Slaver → Strike → Slaver → End Turn
events.reasoning: Near-kill: Empty Fist(9, enters Wrath) + Carve Reality(12 in Wrath) + Strike(12 in Wrath) = 33 vs 34 HP. Slaver to 1 HP. Take 8+debuff. Kill next turn instantly.
Smite in Wrath = 12x2 = 24 damage. Kills Slaver (19 HP). Clean kill!
Slaver at 7 HP. Bowling Bash deals 7 (1 enemy). Exactly kills. Fight over.
Viewing card reward
None are significant upgrades. Deck is 12 cards - dont want to bloat it with mediocre cards.
Done with rewards. Moving on.
Elite at F6. At 84% HP with Fear Potion (Vuln 3), Power Potion, and 7 attacks in 12-card deck. Good attack density for Nob. If Lagavulin/Sentries even better. Both paths lead to F7 Monster(x=0) next.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Lagavulin (ELITE)
FIGHT TYPE: Hard-scaler (kill speed critical after it wakes)
WIN CONDITION: Deal as much damage as possible during 3 free sleep turns, then burst kill after it wakes.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: First 3 turns are free (sleeping). After waking, it hits for 18 + debuffs -1 Str/-1 Dex.
KEY CARDS: All attacks, Fear Potion for Vulnerable 3, Power Potion for setup power
POTION PLAN: Fear Potion on turn 1 for Vuln 3 (50% more damage for 3 free turns!). Power Potion for a random power.

Lagavulin: 109 HP, 8 starting block, Metallicize 12 (12 block per turn).
It stays asleep for 3 turns unless attacked with 10+ damage in a single hit.
Wait - does attacking it wake it up? Let me check: Lagavulin wakes on turn 4 OR if you deal damage to its HP. The block of 8 means I need to deal more than 8 to actually damage its HP.

Plan: Use Fear Potion immediately for Vulnerable 3. Max damage all 3 free turns.
Turn 1 with Vuln on enemy: damage is 50% more.
- Eruption(2E): 9 base. Through 8 block = 1 to HP. With Vuln: 9*1.5=13.5->13. 13 - 8 block = 5 HP damage.
- Actually wait - Vulnerable increases damage to the TARGET, so: 9 *1.5 = 13 damage applied to Lagavulin who has 8 block. 13-8=5 HP damage.

Hmm but Metallicize gives 12 MORE block at start of Lagavulins turn. So next turn itll have 12 block.

Actually, looking more carefully - it already has 8 block and Metallicize 12. At the END of its turn it gains 12 block. So:
- Right now: 8 block, 109 HP.
- If I deal damage: hits go vs 8 block first.
- After my turn, Lagavulin takes its turn (sleeping) and gains 12 more block = 12 block for my turn 2.
- Turn 3 it has 12 block again.
- Turn 4 it wakes and starts attacking.

Plan: Fear Potion + all-out damage turn 1 through the 8 block.
Eruption(2E, Vuln: 13) + Strike(1E, 9) + Carve Reality... wait I have 3E.
- Miracle(0E, +1E) = 4E total.
- Eruption(2E, 13 with Vuln) + Strike(1E, 9 with Vuln) + Strike(1E, 9 with Vuln) + Carve Reality(1E, 9 with Vuln)
  Wait thats 5E. Too much.
- 4E: Eruption(2E) + Strike(1E) + Carve Reality(1E) = 4E. With Vuln: 13 + 9 + 9 = 31 damage vs 8 block. 31-8=23 HP damage!

Actually let me recalculate. With Vulnerable on enemy: my damage is increased by 50%.
- Eruption: 9 * 1.5 = 13 (round down = 13)
- Strike: 6 * 1.5 = 9
- Carve Reality: 6 * 1.5 = 9
Total attacks: 13 + 9 + 9 = 31 vs 8 block = 23 to HP. Lagavulin: 109-23=86 HP.

Good damage! But Ill need to deal 86 more over turns 2-3 with 12 block each turn.

MARGIN NOTE: Lagavulin is perfect for Watcher - 3 free turns to set up and damage without punishment.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Slime Boss
FIGHT TYPE: Boss (HP less critical, kill efficiency matters)
WIN CONDITION: Deal 140 total damage. At 70 HP it splits into 2 large slimes (~65 HP each). Then kill both.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block Slam turns (~35 dmg). Debuff turns are free.
KEY CARDS: Bowling Bash+ (scales with enemies post-split), Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry), Consecrate (free AOE), Battle Hymn (sustained damage)
POTION PLAN: Weak Potion on first Slam turn to reduce damage. Liquid Memories to recover Eruption+ or Bowling Bash+ for burst. Fairy in Bottle = safety net.
RISKS: Slimed flooding draw pile. Need to play through Slimed (1E each) efficiently. Low HP (22) means one unblocked Slam is lethal.
PHASE 1 PLAN: Deal 70 damage to trigger split. Use debuff turns for damage, block Slam turns.
PHASE 2 PLAN: Bowling Bash+ scales with 2 enemies. Wrath burst to kill quickly. Spread damage before killing.

events.label: Boss Strategy
events.reasoning:
FIGHT STRATEGY - Slime Boss
FIGHT TYPE: Boss (HP less critical, kill efficiency matters)
WIN CONDITION: Deal 140 total damage. At 70 HP it splits into 2 large slimes (~65 HP each). Then kill both.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block Slam turns (~35 dmg). Debuff turns are free.
KEY CARDS: Bowling Bash+ (scales with enemies post-split), Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry), Consecrate (free AOE), Battle Hymn (sustained damage)
POTION PLAN: Weak Potion on first Slam turn to reduce damage. Liquid Memories to recover Eruption+ or Bowling Bash+ for burst. Fairy in Bottle = safety net.
RISKS: Slimed flooding draw pile. Need to play through Slimed (1E each) efficiently. Low HP (22) means one unblocked Slam is lethal.
PHASE 1 PLAN: Deal 70 damage to trigger split. Use debuff turns for damage, block Slam turns.
PHASE 2 PLAN: Bowling Bash+ scales with 2 enemies. Wrath burst to kill quickly. Spread damage before killing.

FIGHT STRATEGY - The Collector (Boss)
FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely, but at 19/36 need careful management)
WIN CONDITION: Kill the Collector (282 HP). Minions respawn so ignore/AOE them.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Apparitions (Intangible), Mental Fortress stance cycling, Defend cards. Fear Potion for Vulnerable on Collector.
KEY CARDS: Deva Form (energy scaling), Devotion (Mantra->Divinity for 3x burst), Battle Hymn (Smite generation), Rushdown (draw on Wrath), Mental Fortress+ (6 block/stance change), Brilliance+ (damage scaling with Mantra)
POTION PLAN: Fear Potion when ready for a burst turn to apply Vulnerable.
RISKS: 19 HP is LOW. Collector can deal big damage. Minions add damage. If I lose both Apparitions without blocking, one bad turn is lethal. Deva Form is Ethereal - MUST play this turn or lose it forever.

TURN 1 PLAN:
- Intent: UNKNOWN. Collector typically spawns minions Turn 1.
- Deva Form (3E, Ethereal) MUST be played or it exhausts forever.
- Miracle (0E) gives +1E, so 5E total.
- Play: Miracle (+1E=5E) -> Deva Form (3E, 2E left) -> Brilliance+ (1E, 1E left) at Collector -> Apparition (1E, 0E left) for Intangible
- The other Apparition exhausts (Ethereal, unplayed). Acceptable loss - still have 3 in draw pile.
- OR: Miracle -> Deva Form -> 2x Apparition (2 turns Intangible, no damage)
- Decision: Play Brilliance+ for damage. 282 HP is a LOT to chew through. Every point of damage counts. Intangible from 1 Apparition should protect for the turn.

events.reasoning: Turn 1: Miracle (+1E=5E), Deva Form (3E, MUST play Ethereal, energy scaling engine), Empty Fist+ (14 dmg to Collector), Apparition (Intangible for survival at 19 HP). Second Apparition will exhaust Ethereal - acceptable.

Dismiss Foresight scry Turn 3 of Collector fight
Play both Apparitions for 2 Intangible (Ethereal so must play or lose). 41 incoming damage reduced to 3.
Play Eruption+ at Collector. Exits Calm (+2E), enters Wrath (Rushdown draws 2), deals 18 damage (2x in Wrath) through 15 block.

events.reasoning: Turn 3 continued: Devotion (critical power for Mantra engine), 2x Flurry of Blows + Empty Fist at Collector in Wrath (2x damage). All attacks target Collector. End in Wrath - Intangible 2 protects against doubled incoming.
Dismiss Foresight scry Turn 4 Collector fight

events.reasoning: Turn 4: Play key powers (MF+, Battle Hymn), Consecrate AOE, Bowling Bash+ at Collector (huge damage with 3 enemies in Wrath), Carve Reality at Collector (generates Smite). Stopping before Inner Peace to check state.

events.reasoning: Smite at Collector (12 dmg). Inner Peace enters Calm (MF +6 block). Defend for extra block. End in Calm for +2E next turn.

Play Eruption+ at Torch Head 0. Calm->Wrath = MF +6 block, +2E from Calm exit, Rushdown draws 2 cards. Maximizing block and draw options.
Play Smite at Torch Head 0. In Wrath = 18 damage (12*1.5 with Weak). Torch 0: 27-18=9 HP.
Flurry of Blows at Torch Head 0. 6 damage (4*2*0.75). Torch 0: 9-6=3 HP.

Use Fear Potion on Torch Head 1 (index 1). Apply Vulnerable to enable kill.
Use Fear Potion (slot 0) on Torch Head 1. Apply Vulnerable.
Smite at Torch Head 1 (Vulnerable). In Wrath: 12*2*0.75(Weak)*1.5(Vuln) = 27 damage. Torch 1: 34-27=7 HP.
Empty Fist at Torch Head 1 (7 HP, Vulnerable). 9*2*0.75*1.5=20 damage. KILLS Torch Head 1.

events.reasoning: Turn 6: All attacks at Collector (only enemy). Consecrate + Flurry (0E) + Smite + Brilliance+ + Bowling Bash+ = ~35 damage. Empty Body for block + stay in Calm. 8E available, should have enough for all.

events.reasoning: Turn 7: Maximize block (Vigilance + 2 Defend = 14 more block, total ~20). Smite + Empty Fist+ at Collector for 19 damage. 52 incoming with only 20 block at 16 HP - likely lethal. Doing best possible.
